productDisplayName: Fila Men's Dragger White Red Shoe
description: Get more out of your training with these Dragger cross-trainers from fila. These shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team them with Sports apparel when burning the trail, or simply pair them with jeans and tees for casual outings.Upper Meshed upper for maximum ventilation and durability Synthetic overlays for durability, added structure to the upper and midfoot support Symmetrical lace-up system for snug Fit and protection from blistering Synthetic laces for durability Padded mesh tongue for breathability Padded collar for extra comfort Brand name embedded on the side, appliqued on the tongue and printed on the back of the collar Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Outsole TPR durable rubber outsole for longer shoe life and comfort Flex grooves in forefoot for flexible foot movement Scooped out heel and midfoot with vents in between the outsole and the midsole on the heel to enhance shock absorption Mult-directional pattern grooves and lugs for better grip Small lugs on the midfoot area for stability Shoe careDo not machine washWipe with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from sunlight
